div1.entryFree:
Wickedness, 1) corruption of manners, immorality: As III, 2, 44. H5 IV, 1, 156. H6A III, 1, 14. Especially used of lewdness and incontinence: Wiv. II, 2, 134. Ado III, 2, 113. All's I, 3, 40. III, 2, 89. H5 III, 3, 22.
Apparently == a state of being mischievous: disguise, I see thou art a w., wherein the pregnant enemy does much, Tw. II, 2, 28.
2) a bad action: I'll never care what w. I do, Lr. III, 7, 99. knows he the w.? IV, 2, 92.
